description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named UnitTests that runs on every push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to these branches. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and testing on different environments (Linux and Windows) with various C++ standards (14, 17, 20) and configurations (single-threaded, multi-threaded, with and without Boost). Each job should check out the repository, configure the environment, and then build and test using custom actions.
